name: Non-Compete Agreement
description: A contract restricting an individual from engaging in competitive activities for a specified period and within a defined geographic area.

sections.title: Preamble
sections.content:
This Non-Compete Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}} by and between:

{{company_name}}, with an address at {{company_address}} (the "Company"), and

{{individual_name}}, with an address at {{individual_address}} (the "Individual").

The Company and Individual are collectively referred to as the "Parties."

sections.title: Recitals
Consideration
Non-Compete Covenant
sections.content:
During the term of the Individual's relationship with the Company, and for a period of {{restricted_period_months}} months following the termination of that relationship (the "Restricted Period"), regardless of the reason for termination, the Individual shall not, directly or indirectly:

(a) Engage in, own, manage, operate, control, be employed by, consult for, or participate in any business that competes with the following business activities of the Company:

{{business_description}}

(b) This restriction applies within the following geographic area: {{geographic_area}}.

sections.title: Non-Solicitation
Confidentiality
sections.content: The Individual acknowledges that during their relationship with the Company, they have received or will receive confidential and proprietary information. The Individual agrees to hold all such information in strict confidence and not to use or disclose such information for any purpose other than performing their duties for the Company. This obligation shall survive the termination of this Agreement indefinitely.

sections.title: Remedies
sections.content: The Individual acknowledges that a breach of this Agreement would cause irreparable harm to the Company that cannot be adequately compensated by monetary damages alone. In the event of a breach or threatened breach, the Company shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief, specific performance, and any other equitable remedies, in addition to all other remedies available at law.

sections.title: Severability
sections.content: If any provision of this Agreement is found to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, such provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it valid and enforceable, and the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{governing_law_state}}, without regard to its conflict of laws principles.

sections.title: Signatures
sections.content:
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Non-Compete Agreement as of the date first written above.

Company: {{company_name}}
Signature: ___________________________
Title: ___________________________
Date: ___________________________

Individual: {{individual_name}}
Signature: ___________________________
Date: ___________________________
